# Pull Request

## Summary

What does this PR do? Why?

## Related issues

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Docs / chore
- [ ] Security-sensitive (crypto, session, vault format, clipboard, CSP)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `cargo check` in `src-tauri/` passes
- [ ] `pnpm tauri dev` boots and the unlock flow still works
- [ ] README updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, PINs, or vault contents in the diff or the PR description

## Screenshots / recordings

If the change is visual, attach a short clip or screenshot.

## Notes for reviewers

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
